sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103575" key="tetra/foros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρά-φορος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, cited by Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.234</biblScope> </bibl> on account of its anomalous accent; so that its sense must be act., <sense id="n103575.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing fourfold.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
